title: The civil strife in Baghdad between the troops of the Harbiyyah quarter and those of al-Ma'mun's representative in al-'Iraq, al-Hasan b. Sahl
description: The civil strife in Baghdad between the troops of the Harbiyyah quarter and those of al-Ma'mun's representative in al-'Iraq, al-Hasan b. Sahl. Recorded under the year 198 AH (814–815 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
